news.title: Valero (VLO) Faces A New Oil Supply Test As Hormuz Reopens
news.summary: US and Iran reached a peace agreement that includes reopening the Strait of Hormuz, a key route for global oil shipments. The deal is expected to increase crude flows from the region, affecting global oil supply and pricing. Refiners such as Valero Energy (NYSE:VLO) may see changes in feedstock availability, refining margins, and inventory dynamics as trade routes normalize. news.title: Coherent (COHR) Wins Up To $50 Million For Texas AI Chip Expansion
news.summary: Coherent (NYSE:COHR) announced a letter of intent to receive up to US$50 million in CHIPS and Science Act funding. The funding will support expansion of its Indium Phosphide semiconductor facility in Sherman, Texas. The project is expected to double production space, increase wafer capacity by 4x, and create more than 1,000 jobs.
